title: BHops
body:
This mod adds Bunnyhopping through implementing some quake/source-style physics in minecraft!

A speedometer is available, and is toggleable along with bunnyhopping itself. There are also plenty of config variables to tweak your bunnyhopping experience.

![Config Screen](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/351/110/2021-03-24_18.png)
![Speedometer in Midair](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/351/111/2021-03-24_17.png)
